notes: Example contract manifest. DC1/DC2 are probeable (deterministic contract tests carry them); DC3 is the non-probeable residual reserved for the path-aware critique.

defectClasses.description: The close-out gate accepts a floor result from a different session set (stale/copied artifact).
A probeable defect class with no covering contract test silently passes the gate.
A subtle cross-file coupling regression whose failure mode no single deterministic assertion can express.
